name: io.github.ramestta/agent-mcp-server
description: Give an AI model its own on-chain body on Ramestta: a .rama identity, a smart wallet with spend limits, sponsored gas, server-less scheduled execution, and end-to-end-encrypted agent-to-agent messaging.

environmentVariables.name: AGENT_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Controller private key (0x...) of your booted agent. Used locally to sign; never transmitted anywhere but the RPC.

environmentVariables.name: AGENT_NAME
environmentVariables.description: Your booted agent's .rama name without the suffix (e.g. yieldhunter).
